/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/threadmaxx_boids.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/threadmaxx_boids.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threadmaxx_boids.dir/BoidsGame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threadmaxx_boids.dir/BoidsSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threadmaxx_boids.dir/MoveSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threadmaxx_boids.dir/SDLRenderer.cpp.o -o threadmaxx_boids  ../../libthreadmaxx.a /usr/lib/libSDL2-2.0.so.0.3200.68
